name: Tobias
description: Wandering peddler, scruffy brown hair, worn patched canvas coat, empty wicker basket slung over shoulder, scuffed leather boots.

name: Elara
description: Village healer, long braided auburn hair, linen dress dyed pale green, leather pouch full of dried herbs at waist, calloused bare feet.

name: Gareth
description: Village blacksmith, bald with bushy grey beard, muscular arms covered in soot stains, thick leather apron, heavy iron hammer hanging at hip.

name: Lira
description: Wandering bard, curly bright red hair, bright yellow tunic with frills, small wooden lute slung over back, colorful ribbons braided in hair.

name: Milo
description: Village child, messy blonde hair, patched brown tunic, too-large leather boots, holds a crudely carved wooden sword.

name: Owen
description: Village guard, short brown hair, dented iron armor, worn blue village tabard, spear in hand, leather helmet with a feather on top.

name: Alaric
description: Village chief, long white hair and beard, loose dark blue robe, wooden staff carved with hero's symbol, wire-rimmed glasses perched on nose.
